name: issue-quality-guide
description: Quality standards and best practices for creating issues in client projects

principles.title: Clarity Over Speed
principles.description: Spend time understanding the requirement before creating issues. Vague issues waste development time.

principles.title: Independent, Testable Issues
principles.description: Each issue should be completable without waiting for other issues. If Issue B depends on Issue A, mark the dependency.

principles.title: Traceability to Business Value
principles.description: Every issue should connect to a business requirement or technical debt item. Ask 'Why does this matter?'

principles.title: Realistic Estimation
principles.description: Break large issues into smaller ones. A good issue takes 1-4 hours to complete.

examples: [Auth Service] Implement JWT refresh token rotation
[API Gateway] Configure rate limiting per endpoint
[Database] Add index on users.email for login queries
[Dashboard] Fix timezone display bug for international users

description_format.context_example:
## Context

Why this issue exists. What business problem does it solve or what feature does it enable.

- Related: JIRA-123 or architectural decision [ADR-004]
description_format.technical_example:
## Technical Notes

Language/framework specific notes:
- Use PostgreSQL transaction for data consistency
- Frontend: Use existing API client wrapper
- API: Follow REST conventions

HIGH: Feature requested by client for immediate release
Regression bug affecting significant user base

when_to_create: Issue A cannot be started until Issue B is done
Issue A requires code from Issue B to compile
Issue A's tests depend on Issue B's implementation
dependency_guide.how_to_express: Use add_dependency() to create DEPENDS_ON relationship. Never assume implicit dependencies.
anti_patterns: Creating linear chains where issues are independent
Not marking dependencies when they exist

before_creating: ✓ Description has Context (why), Acceptance Criteria (what), Technical Notes (how)
✓ Each acceptance criterion is testable (can verify with code)
review_questions: Can a developer complete this issue in 1-4 hours?
Does this issue connect to business value?
Are all dependencies to other issues marked?

dependencies: No dependencies when they clearly exist
Creating dependencies to 'future' issues that don't exist yet
